name: Coda Octopus Group, Inc.
business: Coda Octopus Group sells real-time 3D underwater imaging sonar (Echoscope technology), diver augmented reality systems (DAVD), acoustic sensors and materials, and defense engineering sub-assemblies. It serves commercial offshore, defense, medical, and research markets.

exposures.sentence: Our Defense Engineering Services Businesses are suppliers of embedded solutions and sub-assemblies which they design, manufacture and sell as a component of mission critical integrated defense systems.

It functions as a core perception sensor for AI-enabled platforms, supporting navigation, obstacle avoidance, target recognition and guidance and adaptive mission execution with reliance on bandwidth limited communications or post-processing capability.

The Company's NANO Gen Series... addresses the small underwater vehicles, drones, autonomous and robotics platforms which is a growing part of the underwater vehicles market where these are getting increasingly smaller.

Our Marine Technology Business provides technology solutions to the underwater market and constitutes our core business. It owns key proprietary and unique technology comprising its real time volumetric imaging sonar technology (Echoscope technology) and diving technology (DAVD).
PAL also performs calibration services for medical devices and is accredited to ISO/IEC 17025 standard.
Our imaging sonar series which is marketed under the name Echoscope... are used primarily in the underwater construction, offshore renewables, and offshore oil and gas.
Our imaging sonar series which is marketed under the name Echoscope... are used primarily in the underwater construction, offshore renewables, and offshore oil and gas.

Our imaging sonar series which is marketed under the name Echoscope... are used primarily in the underwater construction, offshore renewables, and offshore oil and gas, complex underwater mapping, salvage operations, dredging, bridge inspection.

Our imaging sonar series which is marketed under the name Echoscope... are used primarily in the underwater construction, offshore renewables, and offshore oil and gas, complex underwater mapping, salvage operations, dredging, bridge inspection, navigation of underwater hazard, port and harbor security, ship hull scanning, mining, commercial and defense diving, robotics, autonomous underwater vehicle market, marine sciences sectors.

catalysts.event: Launch of Echoscope PIPE NANO Gen Series during fiscal year 2025
catalysts.sentence: The launch by the Company of its Echoscope PIPE NANO Gen Series in fiscal year 2025, our ultra-compact real time 3D imaging sonar marks a critical step in enabling next-generation subsea AI enabled autonomy.

catalysts.event: Contract to provide DAVD training to European-based foreign navy in Q2 of fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: In the 2025 FY we also received our first small batch order for DAVD system from a very influential European-based foreign navy, and we are contracted to provide training in our second quarter of fiscal 2026 to this navy.

tamClaims.claim: Over 14,000 divers in the USA alone could utilize the DAVD untethered solution.
tamClaims.sentence: In the USA alone there are over 14,000 divers that could utilize this solution including U.S. Special Operations Forces (SOF), EOD (Explosive Ordnance Disposal), US Army, Marine Corps, US Coast Guard, first responders and law enforcement.
